title: ZWILLING Twin Pollux Chinese Chef's Knife, 7 inch & AnySharp Knife Sharpener with PowerGrip, Silver, One Size
features: Product 1: Chinese chef's knife with 18.5 cm blade length and triple riveted handle, Ideal for processing vegetables, meat and fish in the traditional Chinese way

Product 1: High-quality workmanship: Large blade for chopping large vegetables and easily transporting chopped food, Long-lasting sharpness, Stable and flexible thanks to ice-hardened FRIODUR blade, Seamless transition between handle and blade
Product 1: Comfortable and safe handling: Ergonomic plastic handle for safe cutting without slipping, Balanced weight
Product 1: Made in Germany - Made of special stainless steel, Corrosion resistant, Hand cleaning recommended
Product 2: Sharpens any knife with diamond precision
Product 2: Sharpens hardened knives (e.g. Global, Sabatier)
Product 2: Even sharpens serrated knives (e.g. bread knives, hunting knives)
Product 2: Very safe one handed use, PowerGrip suction attaches securely to any flat surface
description: From the manufacturer The optimal equipment for professional and hobby cooks Chinese Twin Pollux chef's knife With the right tools, cooking is not only child's play, but also a lot of fun. With the Chinese chef's knife from ZWILLING you can prepare meat, fish, vegetables and herbs at home in an authentic manner. The thin blade with a large cutting edge and a very sharp cutting edge reliably chops particularly large vegetables, such as different types of cabbage. Your hand is protected by the special shape of the knife and the ergonomically shaped plastic handle. The extra large blade means that the cut material can be easily and cleanly transported into the pot. The modern three-rivet design with the ZWILLING logo makes this elegant knife set an essential part of your kitchen. Best quality with elegant design ZWILLING has upheld high-quality products in the kitchen and beauty sector since 1731. Thanks to our traditional values, creative vision and innovative techniques, we offer you a diverse range of products that are characterised by the highest quality, functionality and an elegant, timeless design. Advantages at a glance: Chinese chef's knife with 18.5 cm blade length Punched steel Ergonomic plastic handle High edge retention Stable and flexible due to ice-hardened blade Balanced weight distribution Modern three-rivet design Made in Germany -Long-lasting, corrosion-resistant High quality special steel Top quality begins with quality material. This is why our knife steel is manufactured to the highest standards. The ZWILLING special alloy is characterised by an optimum ratio between carbon (hardness) and chrome (corrosion resistance). In combination with the manufacturing process, the composition results in a robust and extremely durable knife that is stable, corrosion-resistant and flexible. Thanks to a heat treatment optimally matched to the steel, this steel achieves between 55 and 58 Rockwell. Innovative technique The right material hardness is important: If the steel is too soft, the sharpness of the blade quickly diminishes. If it is too hard the steel breaks. With our innovative FRIODUR blades the steel goes through 4 steps of heat treatment. The last step, ice hardening, improves hardness, wear behaviour and corrosion resistance. In the final process, tension is removed from the material, resulting in high flexibility and safety in use and preventing blade breakage. Modern design The unmistakable three-rivet design of our Twin Pollux knife series is characterised by a flat heel with handle grips mounted on it. The rivets connect the two elements together, making the knife a durable piece of kitchen equipment. Tips for long-lasting sharpness Even a good knife should always be cared for to ensure its sharpness. Therefore only use flexible cutting boards such as bamboo and plastic. A sharpening rod sharpens dull blades. To do this, pull the blade along the sharpening steel at a 15° angle in a slight arc and repeat the process on each side depending on the desired sharpness. High quality special steel Innovative technique Modern design Tips for long-lasting sharpness Save your old knives Whether you’re slicing meat, dicing vegetables, or carving the Sunday Roast, a sharp blade makes cutting effortless. AnySharp restores a super sharp cutting edge to blunt knife blades that have dulled with use. Works with all your knives Hardened steel The AnySharp uses tungsten carbide technology to extend the life of almost any knife. AnySharp works on virtually any knife, including expensive hardened steel knives. Serrated knives AnySharp even works with serrated blades* (like bread knives and hunting knives), making it unlike any knife sharpener, steel or sharpening stone you’ve ever used.*Not very fine toothed serrated knives. No skill required The optimum angle to sharpen a good quality steel knife is 20 degrees. AnySharp is pre-set at 20 degrees to give an optimum edge every time. Getting a consistent angle with a sharpening stone is a skilled job, but AnySharp allows anyone to get professional results without any training at all.
